title: Trump asks FIFA to review the suspension of forward Balogun and the sanction is postponed for a year
summary: FIFA agreed to review the case after Trump's call, which generated criticism for political interference in sports.

title: China launches a ballistic missile from a submarine in the Pacific and triggers international alert
summary: The military exercise, which reached Japan's exclusive economic zone, was interpreted as a show of force towards the United States.

title: Hamas dissolves the Gaza administration to promote the peace plan
summary: The Palestinian movement announced the dissolution of the administrative body in Gaza without mentioning disarmament.

title: Impeachment trial begins in Philippines against Vice President Sara Duterte for alleged corruption
summary: The vice president, daughter of former President Rodrigo Duterte, did not attend the first hearing in the Senate.

title: Prime Minister Takaichi agrees to debate in the budget committee and restart parliamentary sessions
summary: The agreement between the government and the opposition will allow resuming deliberations, pending the reform of the Imperial Household Law.

title: Takaichi government prioritizes reform of the Imperial Household Law amid political controversy
summary: The opposition criticizes the way the executive is pushing the legal modification, considering it a dirty trick.

title: NATO summit in Washington overshadowed by Russian attack on Kiev and Japan's absence
summary: The Russian bombing on the eve of the summit and doubts about Japan's participation and Trump's pressure mark the conclave.

title: Rui Hachimura signs with Los Angeles Clippers for two years and 45 billion yen
summary: The Japanese forward arrives at his third team in the NBA after stints with the Lakers and Wizards.

title: Hayabusa2 probe flies over asteroid Trifne and captures detailed images of its surface
summary: JAXA confirmed the success of the flyby, obtaining photographs showing a shape similar to a gray snowman.

title: A teenager flees from police by swimming through a river in Osaka while being sought for burglary
summary: The suspect, who had a warrant for his arrest, managed to escape by swimming and then boarded a vehicle.

title: The Emperor of Japan attends the Art Academy ceremony and offers tea to the award winners
summary: Emperor Naruhito presided over the award ceremony for 12 artists, including film director Lee Sang-il.

title: Japanese actor Yamamoto Koichi dies at 90 due to lung cancer
summary: Known for his role in 'So nan desu yo, Kawasaki-san', the veteran actor leaves a long career.

title: Man arrested for putting fingers in soy sauce nozzles at Hama Sushi
summary: The suspect, 43, had previously been fined for similar acts at the same chain.

title: A man is stabbed in Nagakute, Aichi, and the attacker flees the scene
summary: The victim, a 20-year-old young man, was taken to the hospital with abdominal injuries while police search for the attacker.

title: Thousands attend funeral of Ayatollah Khamenei in Iran and tributes extend to Iraq
summary: 'Resistance' showed unity at the funeral of the Iranian supreme leader, with marches in several countries in the region.

title: MUFG President Junichi Hanazawa sets a 15% ROE and aims to be among the top five in the world
summary: The executive announced the profitability target and highlighted the use of artificial intelligence to strengthen cybersecurity.

title: Opposition questions Prime Minister Takaichi over defamatory video and his sworn statement
summary: The Prime Minister said he has no intention of refusing to answer questions about the case.

title: Yen falls to 162 yen per dollar, its lowest level in weeks
summary: The Japanese currency weakened in London and Tokyo markets, amid expectations of interest rate differentials.

title: Super Typhoon No. 9 approaches Japan with maximum winds of 80 meters per second
summary: Authorities urge the population to take precautions ahead of a potentially devastating typhoon.

title: JAXA strengthens measures to prevent another H3 rocket failure after its failed launch
summary: A committee of experts will review the processes to ensure the success of future missions of the Japanese flagship rocket.
